title: sphaerostephanos bakeri
intro: Sphaerostephanos bakeri, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos bakeri include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to make a decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
